description_long: This house is a detached residential building with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles and a secondary structure with a flat roof. The main house features white exterior walls, large windows, and a well-defined entryway with a small porch. The property is surrounded by a green lawn, paved walkways, and is enclosed by neighboring buildings or walls, creating a private courtyard. The landscaping includes a row of trees at the rear and a mix of grass and paved surfaces. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper floor partially within the roof space. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on open outdoor space and natural light.
description: A two-story detached house with a reddish-brown gable roof, white walls, large windows, and a landscaped courtyard surrounded by neighboring structures.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main gable roof, white walls, entry porch, and landscaped courtyard.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the backyard, flat-roofed secondary structure, and green lawn.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the row of trees, rear facade, and the full length of the house.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view emphasizing the backyard, paved walkways, and the relationship between the main and secondary structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in pairs
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, steps, and a simple overhang, flanked by large windows
